title: Lumia Skin Frosted Glass Skincare Serum Ad Poster
sourceTitle: Lumia Skin Frosted Glass Skincare Serum Ad Poster 4 AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: premium product advertising poster for LUMIA SKIN, built around frosted glass skincare serum bottle with a minimal white pump and translucent cap. Subject: frosted glass skincare serum bottle with a minimal white pump and translucent cap is the central hero product, with hyaluronic moisture glow visualized as suspended water beads and transparent gel ribbons visualized as a clear benefit-driven commercial device. Scene: clean premium studio set with pale blue gradient, acrylic blocks, water reflections, and generous whitespace frames the product with controlled props, premium negative space, and clean studio hierarchy. Composition: Fixed product-ad composition with the hero product centered or slightly elevated, campaign text integrated cleanly, and strong commercial readability. Style: Premium studio product advertising with clean surfaces, polished reflections, crisp label hierarchy, refined props, and modern campaign finish. Color Palette: Product-led palette with clean neutrals, subtle accent color, controlled reflections, and strong label readability. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: LUMIA SKIN and HYDRATE THE LIGHT appear as short readable campaign text integrated into the layout. Signature Elements: frosted glass skincare serum bottle with a minimal white pump and translucent cap, LUMIA SKIN, hyaluronic moisture glow visualized as suspended water beads and transparent gel ribbons, clean premium studio set with pale blue gradient, acrylic blocks, water reflections, and generous whitespace, and HYDRATE THE LIGHT define the reusable product-ad recipe. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: premium product advertising poster for NOCTURNE AIR, built around matte black home fragrance diffuser with ribbed ceramic cap and small label. Subject: matte black home fragrance diffuser with ribbed ceramic cap and small label is the central hero product, with calming cedar and bergamot scent visualized as thin translucent smoke ribbons and floating botanical notes visualized as a clear benefit-driven commercial device. Scene: moody premium interior shelf with dark stone, warm lamp glow, dried branches, and clean negative space frames the product with controlled props, premium negative space, and clean studio hierarchy. Composition: Fixed product-ad composition with the hero product centered or slightly elevated, campaign text integrated cleanly, and strong commercial readability. Style: Premium studio product advertising with clean surfaces, polished reflections, crisp label hierarchy, refined props, and modern campaign finish. Color Palette: Product-led palette with clean neutrals, subtle accent color, controlled reflections, and strong label readability. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: NOCTURNE AIR and BREATHE IN QUIET appear as short readable campaign text integrated into the layout. Signature Elements: matte black home fragrance diffuser with ribbed ceramic cap and small label, NOCTURNE AIR, calming cedar and bergamot scent visualized as thin translucent smoke ribbons and floating botanical notes, moody premium interior shelf with dark stone, warm lamp glow, dried branches, and clean negative space, and BREATHE IN QUIET define the reusable product-ad recipe. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
